title: Find My Device - Play button
scenario: Find My Device Play button shows hearing safety warning dialog before playing tone on headset
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the Find My Device feature.
4. Tap the Play button in the Find My Device screen.
5. Observe the hearing safety warning dialog that appears.
6. Acknowledge/dismiss the hearing safety warning dialog.
8. Observe the behavior on the headset and the app.
expected: After acknowledging the warning and tapping Play again, a tone plays on the headset, the headset lights flash (if applicable), and the app displays a "Sending tone..." message with an animated stop button.
